task_summaries.task_scope: Measure pairwise correlation strength and overlap in predictive signal among top-ranked correlated feature pairs using evidence refs e3, e4, e13, e16, e22.
Assess feature importance stability under perturbations that remove or combine correlated features within evidence refs e3, e4, e13, e16, e22.
Compare distributional and dependency profiles of correlated features across classes and data partitions using evidence refs e3, e4, e13, e16, e22.
Evaluate whether correlated features exhibit shortcut-like behavior or local label consistency within evidence refs e3, e4, e13, e16, e22.
